name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement

labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?
A clear description of the problem or limitation you're experiencing.

## Proposed solution
Describe what you'd like to see added or changed.

## Which panel or step would this affect?
- [ ] Push Wizard (steps)
- [ ] Repositories panel
- [ ] Clone panel
- [ ] Sync panel
- [ ] Tags & Releases panel
- [ ] Commit History panel
- [ ] SSH Keys panel
- [ ] Templates panel
- [ ] Webhooks panel
- [ ] Collaborators panel
- [ ] Issues panel
- [ ] Accounts panel
- [ ] Scheduled Push panel
- [ ] Watch Mode panel
- [ ] Statistics panel
- [ ] Export / Backup panel
- [ ] Stash panel
- [ ] Branches panel
- [ ] Diff Viewer panel
- [ ] Settings panel
- [ ] Gitflow panel
- [ ] New panel / feature

## Alternatives considered
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've tried.

## Additional context
Add any other context, mockups, or examples here.
